---
title: "DORA & CoARA in Swiss Higher Education"
format:
  dashboard:
    css:
      - ../dashboard-common.css
      - dashboard-naif.css
    expandable: false
author: "Dr Moritz Mähr"
description: "An interactive dashboard showcasing the adoption of DORA and CoARA among Swiss Higher Education Institutions."
image: images/dashboard-screenshot.png
image-alt: "Screenshot of the DORA and CoARA dashboard with key figures and an interactive map"
image-caption: "Dashboard screenshot from the NAIF website, captured on 2026-04-14."
date: today
draft: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, "..")

import html

import folium
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

from _common import (
    DATA_DIR,
    TYPE_LABELS,
    TYPE_ORDER,
    format_identifier,
    format_plain_text,
    format_type_label,
    make_link,
    normalise_yes_no,
    pct,
    render_table,
    type_order_key,
    write_dataframe_xlsx,
)

df = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "hei.csv")
excel_df = pd.read_csv(DATA_DIR / "hei.csv", dtype=str).fillna("")

write_dataframe_xlsx(excel_df, DATA_DIR / "hei.xlsx", sheet_name="Swiss HEIs")

TYPE_COLOURS = {
    "University": "#2563EB",
    "Univ. Inst.": "#7C3AED",
    "UAS": "#F59E0B",
    "UAS Inst.": "#DB2777",
    "UTE": "#0F766E",
}

DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR = "#64748B"
MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR = "#0F172A"
MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR = "#111827"
SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS = [[45.75, 5.85], [47.95, 10.65]]

LEGEND_STYLE = (
    "position: fixed; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.97); "
    "padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #CBD5E1; "
    "box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.12); font-family: sans-serif; "
    "font-size: 13px; color: #111827; z-index: 9999; line-height: 1.35;"
)
LEGEND_SYMBOL_WRAP_STYLE = (
    "position: relative; display: inline-flex; width: 14px; height: 14px; "
    "margin-right: 8px; vertical-align: text-top;"
)
LEGEND_SWATCH_STYLE = (
    "position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 999px; border: 1.5px solid #111827;"
)
LEGEND_MEMBER_DOT_STYLE = (
    "position: absolute; width: 4px; height: 4px; border-radius: 999px; background: #111827; "
    "top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);"
)


def make_legend_symbol(colour: str, show_member_dot: bool = False) -> str:
    """Build the HTML swatch used in the map legend."""
    member_dot_html = (
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_MEMBER_DOT_STYLE}"></span>' if show_member_dot else ""
    )
    return (
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_SYMBOL_WRAP_STYLE}">'
        f'<span style="{LEGEND_SWATCH_STYLE}background:{colour};"></span>'
        f"{member_dot_html}"
        "</span>"
    )


def add_type_legend(
    map_obj: folium.Map, visible_types: set[str], show_member_note: bool = False
) -> None:
    """Attach a type legend to a Folium map."""
    legend_html = f'<div style="{LEGEND_STYLE}">'
    for institution_type in TYPE_ORDER:
        if institution_type not in visible_types:
            continue
        legend_html += (
            '<div style="margin-bottom: 4px;">'
            f"{make_legend_symbol(TYPE_COLOURS.get(institution_type, DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR))}"
            f"{html.escape(TYPE_LABELS[institution_type])}"
            "</div>"
        )

    if show_member_note:
        legend_html += (
            '<div style="margin-top: 8px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid #E5E7EB;">'
            f'{make_legend_symbol("#D1D5DB", show_member_dot=True)}'
            "CoARA member"
            "</div>"
        )

    legend_html += "</div>"
    _ = map_obj.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(legend_html))


def make_tooltip(label: object) -> folium.Tooltip:
    """Create a sticky tooltip with the full institution name."""
    return folium.Tooltip(
        html.escape(format_plain_text(label)),
        sticky=True,
        direction="top",
        opacity=0.96,
    )


def add_member_dot(map_obj: folium.Map, location: list[float]) -> None:
    """Overlay a black centre dot for CoARA members."""
    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=location,
        radius=3,
        color=MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR,
        weight=1,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=MEMBER_DOT_COLOUR,
        fill_opacity=1.0,
        interactive=False,
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(map_obj)


status_columns = ["dora_signatory", "coara_signatory", "coara_member"]

for column in status_columns:
    if column in df.columns:
        df[column] = df[column].map(normalise_yes_no)

total = len(df)
dora_count = int(df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes").sum())
coara_count = int(df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes").sum())
coara_member_count = int(df["coara_member"].eq("Yes").sum())

both_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes")).sum()
)
dora_only_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("Yes") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("No")).sum()
)
coara_only_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("No") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("Yes")).sum()
)
neither_count = int(
    (df["dora_signatory"].eq("No") & df["coara_signatory"].eq("No")).sum()
)
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const switzerlandBounds = [
    [45.75, 5.85],
    [47.95, 10.65],
  ];

  const stripMapIframeFullscreen = () => {
    document
      .querySelectorAll(".quarto-dashboard .cell-output-display iframe[allowfullscreen]")
      .forEach((frame) => {
        frame.removeAttribute("allowfullscreen");
        frame.removeAttribute("webkitallowfullscreen");
        frame.removeAttribute("mozallowfullscreen");
      });
  };

  const refreshLeafletMaps = () => {
    document
      .querySelectorAll(".quarto-dashboard .cell-output-display iframe")
      .forEach((frame) => {
        try {
          const frameWindow = frame.contentWindow;
          if (!frameWindow?.L?.Map) {
            return;
          }

          Object.values(frameWindow).forEach((value) => {
            if (value instanceof frameWindow.L.Map) {
              value.invalidateSize();
              value.fitBounds(switzerlandBounds);
            }
          });
        } catch (_error) {
          // Ignore iframe timing issues while tabs are switching.
        }
      });
  };

  stripMapIframeFullscreen();
  window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 250);

  document.addEventListener("shown.bs.tab", () => {
    stripMapIframeFullscreen();
    window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 150);
  });

  const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
    stripMapIframeFullscreen();
    window.setTimeout(refreshLeafletMaps, 150);
  });
  observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
});
</script>
```

## Row {height=100%}

### Column {.tabset}

#### About

```{python}
#| echo: false
about_html = f"""
<div class="dashboard-about">
  <h5 class="dashboard-subheading">Key figures</h5>
  <table class="table table-sm" style="max-width: 52ch;">
    <thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Count</th><th>Share</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Total HEIs</td><td>{total}</td><td>&ndash;</td></tr>
      <tr><td>DORA signatories</td><td>{dora_count}</td><td>{pct(dora_count, total)}</td></tr>
      <tr><td>CoARA signatories</td><td>{coara_count}</td><td>{pct(coara_count, total)}</td></tr>
      <tr><td>CoARA members</td><td>{coara_member_count}</td><td>{pct(coara_member_count, total)}</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <p>
    This dashboard covers <strong>{total}</strong> Swiss Higher Education Institutions
    and tracks adoption of the
    <a href="https://sfdora.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">San Francisco Declaration on Research Assessment</a>
    (DORA) and the
    <a href="https://coara.eu/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Agreement on Reforming Research Assessment</a>
    (CoARA). On the CoARA map, a <strong>black centre dot</strong> marks CoARA members.
  </p>

  <h5 class="dashboard-subheading" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">Institution types</h5>
  <table class="table table-sm" style="max-width: 52ch;">
    <thead><tr><th>Abbreviation</th><th>Full name</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td><strong>University</strong></td><td>Cantonal universities and federal institutes of technology</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Univ.&nbsp;Inst.</strong></td><td>University institutes</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>UAS</strong></td><td>Universities of applied sciences</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>UAS&nbsp;Inst.</strong></td><td>UAS institutes</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>UTE</strong></td><td>Teacher education institutions</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <h5 class="dashboard-subheading" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">See also</h5>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="../tobi/">TOBI Dashboard</a> &ndash; findability and publication counts</li>
    <li><a href="../swiss-hei-open-data/">Swiss HEI Open Data Dashboard</a> &ndash; institutional identifiers</li>
    <li>
      <a href="../../posts/2026-03-25-naif-continues-tobi/">
        How NAIF builds on TOBI&rsquo;s results
      </a> &ndash; NAIF blog
    </li>
  </ul>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(about_html))
```

#### DORA

```{python}
#| echo: false
dora_df = df[
    (df["dora_signatory"] == "Yes") & df["lat"].notna() & df["lon"].notna()
].copy()

m = folium.Map(
    location=[46.8, 8.3],
    zoom_start=7,
    control_scale=True,
    tiles="cartodbpositron",
)
m.fit_bounds(SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS)

for _, r in dora_df.iterrows():
    institution_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["name"]))
    short_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["short_name"]))
    institution_type = html.escape(format_type_label(r["type"]))
    town = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["town"]))

    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[r["lat"], r["lon"]],
        radius=10,
        color=MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR,
        weight=2,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=TYPE_COLOURS.get(r["type"], DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR),
        fill_opacity=0.92,
        tooltip=make_tooltip(r["name"]),
        popup=(
            f"<b>{institution_name}</b><br>"
            f"Short name: {short_name}<br>"
            f"Type: {institution_type}<br>"
            f"Town: {town}<br>"
            f"CoARA signatory: {r['coara_signatory']}"
        ),
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(m)

add_type_legend(m, set(dora_df["type"].dropna().tolist()))

display(m)
```

#### CoARA

```{python}
#| echo: false
coara_df = df[
    (df["coara_signatory"] == "Yes") & df["lat"].notna() & df["lon"].notna()
].copy()

m = folium.Map(
    location=[46.8, 8.3],
    zoom_start=7,
    control_scale=True,
    tiles="cartodbpositron",
)
m.fit_bounds(SWITZERLAND_BOUNDS)

for _, r in coara_df.iterrows():
    institution_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["name"]))
    short_name = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["short_name"]))
    institution_type = html.escape(format_type_label(r["type"]))
    town = html.escape(format_plain_text(r["town"]))
    member_text = "Yes" if r["coara_member"] == "Yes" else "No"
    location = [r["lat"], r["lon"]]

    marker = folium.CircleMarker(
        location=location,
        radius=10,
        color=MARKER_STROKE_COLOUR,
        weight=2,
        fill=True,
        fill_color=TYPE_COLOURS.get(r["type"], DEFAULT_TYPE_COLOUR),
        fill_opacity=0.92,
        tooltip=make_tooltip(r["name"]),
        popup=(
            f"<b>{institution_name}</b><br>"
            f"Short name: {short_name}<br>"
            f"Type: {institution_type}<br>"
            f"Town: {town}<br>"
            f"DORA signatory: {r['dora_signatory']}<br>"
            f"CoARA member: {member_text}"
        ),
    )
    _ = marker.add_to(m)

    if r["coara_member"] == "Yes":
        add_member_dot(m, location)

add_type_legend(
    m,
    set(coara_df["type"].dropna().tolist()),
    show_member_note=True,
)

display(m)
```

#### Stats

```{python}
#| echo: false
stats_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        ["DORA signatories", dora_count, pct(dora_count, total)],
        ["CoARA signatories", coara_count, pct(coara_count, total)],
        ["CoARA members", coara_member_count, pct(coara_member_count, total)],
        ["DORA + CoARA", both_count, pct(both_count, total)],
        ["DORA only", dora_only_count, pct(dora_only_count, total)],
        ["CoARA only", coara_only_count, pct(coara_only_count, total)],
        ["Neither", neither_count, pct(neither_count, total)],
    ],
    columns=["Metric", "Count", "Share"],
)

type_stats = (
    df.assign(type_order=df["type"].apply(type_order_key))
    .groupby("type", dropna=False)
    .agg(
        Institutions=("name", "size"),
        DORA=("dora_signatory", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        CoARA=("coara_signatory", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        CoARA_members=("coara_member", lambda s: int((s == "Yes").sum())),
        type_order=("type_order", "min"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)

type_stats["DORA %"] = (100 * type_stats["DORA"] / type_stats["Institutions"]).map(
    lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%"
)
type_stats["CoARA %"] = (
    100 * type_stats["CoARA"] / type_stats["Institutions"]
).map(lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%")
type_stats["CoARA member %"] = (
    100 * type_stats["CoARA_members"] / type_stats["Institutions"]
).map(lambda x: f"{x:.1f}%")

type_stats["Type code"] = type_stats["type"].apply(format_plain_text)
type_stats["Institution type"] = type_stats["type"].apply(format_type_label)

type_stats = (
    type_stats.rename(columns={"CoARA_members": "CoARA members"})
    .sort_values(["type_order", "Institution type"])
    .loc[
        :,
        [
            "Type code",
            "Institution type",
            "Institutions",
            "DORA",
            "DORA %",
            "CoARA",
            "CoARA %",
            "CoARA members",
            "CoARA member %",
        ],
    ]
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

display(HTML(
    '<div class="dashboard-about">'
    '<h5 class="dashboard-subheading">Summary</h5>'
    f"{render_table(stats_df)}"
    '<h5 class="dashboard-subheading" style="margin-top: 1.5rem;">By institution type</h5>'
    f"{render_table(type_stats)}"
    "</div>"
))
```

#### List of Institutions

```{python}
#| echo: false
all_institutions = df[
    [
        "name",
        "short_name",
        "type",
        "town",
        "dora_signatory",
        "coara_signatory",
        "coara_member",
        "swissuniversities_name",
    ]
].copy()

all_institutions["type_order"] = all_institutions["type"].apply(type_order_key)
all_institutions["short_name"] = all_institutions["short_name"].apply(format_plain_text)
all_institutions["type"] = all_institutions["type"].apply(format_type_label)
all_institutions["town"] = all_institutions["town"].apply(format_plain_text)
all_institutions["swissuniversities_name"] = all_institutions[
    "swissuniversities_name"
].apply(format_plain_text)

all_institutions = all_institutions.rename(
    columns={
        "name": "Institution",
        "short_name": "Short",
        "type": "Type",
        "town": "Town",
        "dora_signatory": "DORA",
        "coara_signatory": "CoARA sig.",
        "coara_member": "CoARA member",
        "swissuniversities_name": "swissuniversities",
    }
)

all_institutions = all_institutions.sort_values(
    ["type_order", "Town", "Institution"]
).reset_index(drop=True)

all_institutions = all_institutions[
    [
        "Institution",
        "Short",
        "Type",
        "Town",
        "DORA",
        "CoARA sig.",
        "CoARA member",
        "swissuniversities",
    ]
]

display(
    HTML(
        '<p class="dashboard-download-note">'
        "For open data identifiers (ROR, OpenAlex, Wikidata, etc.), "
        'see the <a href="../swiss-hei-open-data/">Swiss HEI Open Data Dashboard</a>.'
        "</p>"
    )
)
display(HTML(f'<div class="dashboard-table-wrap">{render_table(all_institutions)}</div>'))
```

#### Data Download

```{python}
#| echo: false
download_html = """
<div class="dashboard-download">
  <div class="dashboard-download-actions">
    <a class="btn btn-primary" href="../_data/hei.csv" download="hei.csv">Download CSV</a>
    <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="../_data/hei.xlsx" download="hei.xlsx">
      Download Excel (.xlsx)
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
"""
display(HTML(download_html))
```
